introSection: Happy Train (Georgian: მხიარული მატარებელი) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Gldani Park in Tbilisi, Georgia

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Happy Train (Georgian: მხიარული მატარებელი) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Gldani Park in Tbilisi, Georgia



Yellow track and unpainted supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
